violations.text: The walls in the walk-in cooler was observed with an accumulation of dust. The non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with: 1) The ice machine and sliding door cooler observed with an accumulation of duct tape 2) The fan cover of the walk-in cooler observed with an accumulation of dust and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and fan cover of the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of biofilm and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023
